name: scaffoldApp
_note: app-maker.scaffoldApp is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/appmaker.js:13), NOT a runMacro/MACROS macro — it is reached only via /api/lens/:domain/:id/run + /api/lens/run, dispatched on the EXACT `${domain}.${action}` key 'app-maker.scaffoldApp' (no normalization; server.js:39281). The /lenses/app-maker page drives it through useRunArtifact('app-maker') — the HYPHENATED id (a non-hyphen 'appmaker' resolves to NO receiver / unknown_macro). DETERMINISTIC: pure spec→scaffold compute, no LLM, no network. An empty/absent/non-array spec degrades graceful (ok:true with a 'No pages defined' message OR a caught handler_error), never throws. Because it lives in LENS_ACTIONS (not MACROS), the macro-assassin's enumerateMacros(MACROS) pipeline does not drive this contract; it is authored as a behavioral spec + is pinned by server/tests/appmaker-lens-macros.test.js + server/tests/app-maker-domain-parity.test.js.
